title_en: From Closed Island to Sovereign Hub — Lace 2.0, Filecoin, and the L2 Full Stack Extend Cardano's Perimeter
title_ja: 「閉じた島」から「主権ハブ」へ — Lace 2.0 / Filecoin / L2 フルスタックで Cardano が外延を広げた週
executive_summary_en: W18 will be recorded as the week Cardano extended its perimeter — from "closed island" to "sovereign hub." Three axes synced: (1) User-facing multichain — Lace Mobile launched Apr 29; Lace 2.0 shipped Apr 30 with day-one support across Cardano + Bitcoin + Midnight, the first frontend that breaks Cardano out of its closed-island posture. (2) L1+L2 architecture self-sufficiency — IOG's L2 full stack (Midgard + Hydra + optimistic rollup) entered the official roadmap May 1; Hydra v2 alpha removed the collectCom phase; Charms Beaming landed BTC as eBTC on Cardano mainnet. The structural alternative to wrapped-bridge L2 has materialized at implementation layer. (3) Enterprise interconnect ignited — Filecoin × Cardano official conversation (Charles × Marta Belcher, Apr 30), USDM Michigan MTL approval (Apr 28), and Cardano Foundation × Grant Thornton's world-first onchain financial audit (May 2) all aligned in the same week. The backdrop is W17's IOG 2026 budget of $46.8M (-52% YoY) — firing all three axes on less than half last year's budget is itself the implementation evidence for the Architecture Paradigm Shift doctrine (post-Kelp DAO $293M hack). The AI Agent Economy was made visible via Charles's Consensus 2026 main-stage preview (May 14-16, "Agents · Privacy · Blockchain") and Cardano's official x402 integration — positioning W19+ as the moment that layer descends. Markets: VIX 16.99 (-9.19% W-o-W) deepens chronic-vol absorption; USDJPY 157.033 (-1.44%) signals sharp yen strength as Powell delivered an effectively final FOMC press (Apr 29-30). Self-sufficient (W17) → outward extension (W18): Cardano now delivers its own designed standard to the outside world.
executive_summary_ja: W18 は、Cardano が「閉じた島から主権ハブへ」外延を広げた週として記録される。三軸が同期した。第一軸は Lace 2.0 マルチチェーン（4/29 Lace Mobile・4/30 Lace 2.0 が Cardano+Bitcoin+Midnight 初日対応）── 閉じた島を脱した最初のフロントエンド。第二軸は L1+L2 アーキテクチャの自立完成（5/1 IOG L2 フルスタック発表＝Midgard+Hydra+optimistic rollup・Hydra v2 alpha collectCom 撤廃・Charms Beaming で BTC が eBTC として Cardano メインネットに着地）── wrapped-bridge L2 の構造的代替案が実装層で具体化。第三軸はエンタープライズ接続の起動（4/30 Filecoin×Cardano 公式対談・4/28 USDM Michigan MTL 認可・5/2 Cardano Foundation×Grant Thornton 世界初オンチェーン財務監査）。背景には W17 の IOG 2026 予算 $46.8M（前年比 -52%）が効いており、半分以下の規模で三軸同時着火という事実が田平氏の Architecture Paradigm Shift ドクトリン（Kelp DAO $293M ハック後の wrapped-bridge L2 終焉論）を裏付ける。AI Agent Economy は Charles の Consensus 2026 main stage 予告（5/14-16・Agents/Privacy/Blockchain）と Cardano 公式 x402 統合で「次の応用層」として可視化され、来週以降の主題に位置付けられた。マーケットは VIX 16.99（-9.19% W-o-W）で慢性化処理が深化、USDJPY 159.333→157.033（-1.44%）と急速な円高に振れ、FOMC（4/29-30）通過の Powell が事実上の最終会見を実施。自立（W17）→外延（W18）の連続二週で、Cardano は自ら設計した標準を外部世界に届けるフェーズに入った。

four_panel_summary.governance: IOG 2026 budget disclosed at $46.8M (-52% YoY), 9 proposals incl. CIP-159 microfee + multi-asset treasury extending Cardano's revenue layer. Intersect Constitutional Committee election extended from May 1 to May 8. Pondora zero-treasury controversy + Charles defending ambassadors signals mature self-cleansing. SIPO DRep #11 / 1,010. US: Charles vs CLARITY structural critique + Schwartz (Ripple CTO) alignment broadens "industry-wide interest" framing. JP: Post-FSA-final-guidelines implementation-phase, Rakuten Wallet XRP conversion launched.
four_panel_summary.governance_ja: IOG 2026予算実数 $46.8M（前年比-52%）公表・9提案にCIP-159マイクロフィー＋マルチアセット財務追加で収益層拡張。Intersect CC選挙5/1→5/8に延長。Pondoraゼロ財務論争・Charlesアンバサダー擁護で自浄プロセス進行。SIPO DRep #11 / 1,010維持。米: Charles vs CLARITY構造批判→Schwartz（Ripple CTO）同調で「業界全体不利益」論拡大。日: FSA最終ガイドライン後の実装フェーズ、Rakuten Wallet XRP変換開始。
four_panel_summary.defi: Cardano TVL ~$148M (+2.1% W-o-W). Lace 2.0 day-one multichain (Cardano + BTC + Midnight) = first frontend out of closed-island posture. Daedalus 8.0.0 + Mithril bootstrap. IOG L2 full stack (Midgard + Hydra + optimistic rollup) on official roadmap. Hydra v2 alpha removes collectCom. Charms Beaming lands BTC as eBTC on mainnet. Materios DeFi intent settlement primitive. pogun.io BTC DeFi-to-Cardano. Formal verification milestone (Romain Soulat, Apr 29).
four_panel_summary.defi_ja: Cardano TVL 約$148M（+2.1% W-o-W）。Lace 2.0が初日マルチチェーン対応（Cardano+BTC+Midnight）── 閉じた島を脱した最初のフロントエンド。Daedalus 8.0.0+Mithrilブートストラップ。IOG L2フルスタック（Midgard+Hydra+optimistic rollup）公式ロードマップ化。Hydra v2 alphaがcollectCom撤廃。Charms BeamingでBTCがeBTCとしてメインネット着地。Materiosインテント決済プリミティブ。pogun.io BTC DeFi-to-Cardano。形式検証マイルストーン達成（Romain Soulat、4/29）。
four_panel_summary.midnight: Midnight Explorer v2.0.0 LIVE (Apr 28) with near-zero downtime upgrade — operational maturity at implementation layer. USDM Michigan MTL approval (Apr 28) — first US state-level regulatory record for any Cardano-native stable. NIGHT crosses 69,000 holders despite -14.77% W-o-W price (price lags, usage leads). 1AM CLI Midnight dev tools released (May 1). Charles Consensus 2026 main stage May 14-16 "Agents · Privacy · Blockchain" — Trinity Doctrine on Tier-1 stage.
four_panel_summary.midnight_ja: Midnight Explorer v2.0.0がnear-zero downtime upgradeでLIVE（4/28）── 運用成熟度が実装層で具現化。USDM Michigan MTL認可（4/28）── Cardano nativeステーブル初の米国州規制実績。NIGHT 69,000ホルダー突破（価格-14.77% W-o-Wでも利用は先行）。1AM CLI Midnight開発者ツール公開（5/1）。Charles Consensus 2026 main stage予告（5/14-16・Agents/Privacy/Blockchain）── Trinity DoctrineがTier 1ステージへ。
four_panel_summary.risk: Overall MEDIUM (↘ improving). VIX 16.99 (-9.19% W-o-W) deepens chronic-vol absorption — even during WTI/Brent intraweek spike to $108/$111. USDJPY 157.033 (-1.44%) signals sharp yen strength regime as Powell delivered de-facto final FOMC press (Apr 29-30). BTC +0.98%, SPX 7,230 record-territory. COIN -4.27% single-issuer drag continues. Architecture LOW: Lace 2.0 multichain + IOG L2 full stack + formal verification milestone make UTxO + Partner Chain advantage code-level visible.
four_panel_summary.risk_ja: 総合MEDIUM（↘改善傾向）。VIX 16.99（-9.19% W-o-W）でWTI/Brent intraweekスパイク（$108/$111）も慢性化処理深化。USDJPY 157.033（-1.44%）で急速円高、Powell事実上最終FOMC会見（4/29-30）。BTC +0.98%・SPX 7,230過去最高更新圏。COIN -4.27%は単独要因継続。Architecture LOW: Lace 2.0マルチチェーン+IOG L2フルスタック+形式検証マイルストーンでUTxO+Partner Chain優位がコードレベルで可視化。
